title: lomagramma wilkesiana
intro: Lomagramma wilkesiana, also known as the Austral fern or New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Lomagramma wilkesiana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lomagramma wilkesiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
